You can see John's speeches and appearances in Parliament below (provided by theyworkforyou):

Leaving the EU: Farming Policy | Oral Answers to Questions - Environment, Food and Rural Affairs | Commons debates

What plans he has to implement an independent farming policy after the UK leaves the EU.

Leaving the EU: Farming Policy | Oral Answers to Questions - Environment, Food and Rural Affairs | Commons debates

Many farmers in my constituency are very concerned at the decision of the SNP Scottish Government to opt out of key parts of the Bill.

Leaving the EU: Fishing Industry | Oral Answers to Questions - Scotland | Commons debates

Engagements | Oral Answers to Questions - Prime Minister | Commons debates

Small Business Saturday takes place this Saturday.

Leaving the EU: Fishing Industry | Oral Answers to Questions - Scotland | Commons debates

What recent discussions he has had with the fishing industry in Scotland on access to UK fishing waters after the UK leaves the EU.

Road Safety and the Legal Framework - [Mr Clive Betts in the Chair] | Westminster Hall debates
